name: Confirmation
description: SYNTHETIC. Shows a card visual, a products-opened list (name + account number per product — chequing always, credit card too if the cross-sell offer was accepted, each with its own generated account number), current balance, and, if a credit card was added, its mail-delivery timing. Branch channel additionally shows a QR code and infotip so the FA can hand the device to the customer to set up online banking access.
